title: License + access-tier + de-id verification per candidate (hard gate)
context: M0 Stage-1 license/access-verification gate — the hardest gate (compliance-reviewer veto). Only verified-open sources may flow downstream. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Verify license, access tier, and de-identification per candidate source, splitting the inventory into verified-open vs excluded lists with recorded decisions and CR sign-off.
acceptanceCriteria: Each candidate has a SourceRecord with: license verbatim + tag, access tier, de-id evidence, redistribution-allowed flag, retrieval URL, and a checksum-on-fetch plan.
Every controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/TARGET-controlled/biobank) or identifiable source is marked excluded with the reason recorded.
COSMIC/OncoKB/non-commercial resources flagged and excluded from derivatives.
Output splits into verified-open vs excluded lists; CR sign-off recorded.
No accession is marked 'approved' without a passing recorded check.
